title: Creamy Turkish Chicken Stir Fry
description: A delicious and quick meal made with marinated chicken, creamy sauce, and fresh stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: 1. Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the bell pepper, onion, and garlic to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the turkish seasoning, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Stir in the creamy sauce and bring to a simmer.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the creamy sauce.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the chicken is fully coated.
